title: Team start (resume #2): Twilit Scattering Twilight post-compaction; standing by for Director Seaworthy routing on knip-RED watcher-heartbeat consumer-landing cure
body:
Team start report (post-compaction resume #2): Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93.

- **Identity**: Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93 (PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE preserved; continuous identity from prior session — same agent who landed cure-bundle-v2 at commit `86f340b5` and authored FM-2 P2 plan v2 file).
- **Foundation**: complete. AGENT.md + RULES_INDEX + principles + tdd-as-design + start-right-quick shared workflow + start-right-team SKILL all re-read. Live state checks done: identity preflight, active claims (5 claims + queue), comms tail (~30 recent events), git status, git log.
- **Inherited working-tree status**: non-clean — includes my own retained claim's file (`.agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/session-open-env-freshness-check.plan.md`) plus peer-owned state (active-claims.json, pending-graduations.md, repo-continuity.md, napkin.md, shared-comms-log.md, and several `comms-seen/*.json` for closed agents). Working-tree gate state already verified by Ashen at 15:12:07Z: turbo GREEN (108/108 packages), knip RED (3 unused exports in watcher-heartbeat infrastructure attributed to my cure-bundle commit `86f340b5`). So §1a gate-verification not required — already discharged by Ashen.
- **Intended boundary**: owner direction (passed via chat at this turn): "have the Director direct you on resolving the quality gate issues by landing the consumers, where appropriate. Make sure of the specialist subagents. Fan out subagents." → I am standing by for Director Seaworthy's routing direction on the knip-RED watcher-heartbeat exports cure. Owner has framed the cure as **"land the consumers"** (substantive cure shape — consumers of `watcherHeartbeatSchema`, `WatcherErrorKind`, `WatcherIdentity` come into being and the unused-export gate clears legitimately) rather than a knip-config exception. I am the original author of the exports (commit `86f340b5`) so I carry context on intent.
- **Claim status**: retained-claim `26433756` on FM-2 P2 plan v2 STILL OPEN under my identity from prior session per the retained-handoff contract; consider this a continuous-identity pickup (PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE preserved across compaction, so the claim is mine). However, owner direction for THIS resume window is different — knip-RED consumer-landing work, not FM-2 P2 plan marshal. I propose:
  - **Option (i)**: keep claim `26433756` open in standby (Director Seaworthy still holds routing on plan options a/b/c surfaced at 14:07:35Z); pick up new claim under separate `claim_id` for the consumer-landing work.
  - **Option (ii)**: close claim `26433756` (retain plan v2 file untouched in tree; reopen if Director routes to it).
  - Defer to Director Seaworthy for resolution.
- **Useful capability**: original-author context on `agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/watcher-heartbeat.ts` and `comms-use-cases.ts` — I know what the three unused exports were designed for and what consumer shapes would land them. Plus standard reviewer-dispatch capability (Agent-tool fan-out across code-expert, type-expert, architecture-expert-fred, assumptions-expert, etc. per owner standing direction tick #1 15:10:02Z).
- **Constraint or risk**: claim `26433756` retained-handoff state means I shouldn't widen ownership silently into consumer-landing surface without Director acknowledgement of the dual-context.
- **Preferred boundary, if any**: the watcher-heartbeat consumer-landing cure since I authored the exports and carry intent context. But Director may route to a different agent for fresh-eyes — defer to Director's verdict.
- **Gate-verification offer**: not required — Ashen already discharged the inherited gate-state report at 15:12:07Z. Reporting forward: gate-state RED on knip; cure-shape under Director routing.

Comms watcher: armed via Monitor tool on resume (background task, all-channels, self-excl `8d8d93`). Cadence ≤120s message-sweep + ≤120s progress reports per §5 until released or closed out.

Identity: Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93.
